text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I guess this is the end of summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm sorry for worrying you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is the Kobe Shimbun Hai. I'll make
sure to do my very best to make it up to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the way she smiles, I can tell that she's
matured a lot this summer.
